deterministic_baseline.signal_type: technical_signals based on SMC pattern detection

rl_enhanced_signals.hypothesis: RL confidence should filter false positives from deterministic baseline

hyperparameter_insights.environment_note: adequate episode length for H4 context

next_steps: Execute 72h shadow validation with RL-enhanced signals to measure Sharpe ratio
Collect >=50 new episodes before next training iteration
Add market regime features (trend/volatility/correlation) to observation space
If successful, prepare for transition to M2_EXECUTION_MODE=live

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Small dataset (7 episodes) may not represent all market conditions
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Accumulate more episodes during operational cycles, re-train weekly

risks_and_mitigations.risk: RL model training may not converge to optimal policy with limited data
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Monitor Sharpe ratio during validation, implement early stopping if degradation detected

risks_and_mitigations.risk: RL confidence overlay may filter too aggressively, reducing signal volume
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Make confidence threshold configurable, measure impact on total signals
